title: Mind-Clone DNA (canonical v2026 format)
description: Frontmatter schema for canonical mind-clone files in ~/businesses/_library/dna/. Body must contain the 10 canonical sections (see TEMPLATE.md). Body validation lives in validators.{ts,py}.

name.description: Kebab-case identifier matching the file name (without .md)

description.description: Triggers + anti-patterns. Format: 'Use quando ... Invocar para: ... NÃO usar para: ...'

tools.description: Semantic tool names (Read, Write, Grep, Glob, WebSearch, WebFetch, Bash, etc.). Adapter translates to runtime-native names.

category.description: Optional explicit category override. If absent, inferred from parent directory name.

fidelity.description: Fidelity self-declaration. 'high' implies grounded in published material; 'low' means inferred.
